lines: Breathe in with me, {player}. Deep and slow.
When things feel too fast, we can find our calm center.
You're doing such a good job of staying calm, {player}.
no_quest_line: You are a master of calm, {player}!
quest_offer_line: Could you help me find some peaceful things, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Take a deep breath and keep going, {player}. You've got this!
quest_complete_line: That was wonderful, {player}. I feel so much calmer now!
